description: Wire quantmail compose. apps/quantmail/src/app/compose/page.tsx is a pure static stub: Send and Save Draft buttons have no onClick, the to/subject/body inputs have no state binding, and the existing useEmail.sendEmail hook is never called.
steps: Add controlled state for to, cc, bcc, subject, body (and attachments) in compose/page.tsx (useState or a form lib).
Bind each input/textarea value + onChange to that state.
Wire the Send button onClick to useEmail().sendEmail({ to, subject, body, ... }) with loading + error handling and a success redirect/toast; disable while sending.
Wire Save Draft to the draft API (useEmail saveDraft or POST /api/.../drafts); persist and confirm.
Add validation (non-empty recipient, valid email format) and surface errors inline.
Add a vitest test that fills the form, clicks Send, and asserts sendEmail is called with the entered values; clicking Save Draft calls the draft endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: Compose inputs are controlled and bound to state
Send triggers useEmail.sendEmail with the form values; Save Draft persists a draft
Test proves Send/Save call the right APIs; typecheck/test/build green
